Now for some work. Ready below and tell me if you understand the request. You'll need memory from previous chat sessions.

[Pasted text #1 · 69 lines]

--- Begin [Pasted text #1 · 69 lines] ---
# Direction Change — Pause Frontend Expansion and Finish APK ExtractionPause the current canonical-schema and frontend catalog expansion work.The immediate priority is now the UbuntuMac APK extraction pipeline.The current findings show that the remaining manager metadata is likely stored in IL2CPP-backed MonoBehaviours and that `global-metadata.dat` is present in the APK. The next milestone is therefore not to formalize incomplete anonymous records, but to recover enough Unity/IL2CPP type information to extract a complete manager record.## Immediate ObjectiveDemonstrate one manager extracted end to end from APK data with:- game ID- display name- rarity- role- element- active ability- passive abilities- sprite reference- source paths- evidence/provenanceDo not proceed with broad frontend integration or finalize the canonical manager contract until this proof is complete.## Required Work on UbuntuMac1. Install the tooling needed for IL2CPP analysis.2. Recover type/class information from:   - `global-metadata.dat`   - the game native binary3. Inspect and deserialize relevant MonoBehaviours.4. Identify the manager definition class or classes.5. Extract one known manager completely.6. Document:   - class names   - field names   - source assets   - relationships between manager IDs, localization, abilities, rarity, role, and sprites7. Only after the proof succeeds, generalize the extractor for all managers.## Tooling OrderPrefer this sequence:1. Il2CppDumper or Cpp2IL on UbuntuMac2. AssetRipper if needed for validation or easier inspection3. UnityPy with recovered type trees4. Runtime capture only if static extraction still leaves unresolved references## Important Constraints- Do not accept Option D as the production architecture.- Do not merge legacy named records with APK IDs without a verified crosswalk.- Do not finalize a large canonical schema around unknown/null fields.- Do not continue treating the legacy manager database as the long-term source of truth.- Do not wait for a future APK update before exhausting the current APK's IL2CPP metadata.## Deliverables Before Returning to Frontend Work- A written extraction report- One complete manager JSON record- The recovered Unity/IL2CPP class layout used- A repeatable extraction command or script- A mapping diagram showing:  `superManagerId -> manager definition -> localization/name -> abilities -> sprite`- A recommendation for the generalized M5/M8 extraction pipelineOnce this proof is complete, resume canonical-contract design and frontend activation using fields confirmed by actual APK extraction.
--- End [Pasted text #1 · 69 lines] ---
